name: Planhat Customer Platform API
what_it_does: Planhat REST API for customer platform combining CS, revenue operations, and product analytics. Enables AI agents to query company and end-user data, health metrics, revenue indicators, playbooks, and NPS data. Planhat positions as a unified customer platform beyond traditional CS tools.
use_cases: Querying customer health and revenue metrics from retention analytics agents
Retrieving playbook activity and CSM task status from workflow automation agents
Accessing NPS and product usage data from customer intelligence agents
Integrating customer journey data into revenue operations pipeline agents
not_for: B2C companies (Planhat is B2B SaaS focused)
Fully automated customer interventions without human oversight
best_when: A SaaS company on Planhat wants AI agents to analyze customer health, surface at-risk accounts, and feed intelligence into CSM and RevOps workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer usage and business intelligence data requires careful handling. Revenue data should not flow to unauthorized agents.

auth.notes: Planhat API token authentication. Tokens generated in Planhat account settings. Tenant-scoped access.

pricing.notes: B2B SaaS CS platform with negotiated pricing. API access included with subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; documented in Planhat API docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer health, revenue, and usage data are sensitive business intelligence
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Planhat API uses offset pagination with configurable page sizes
Revenue and expansion data requires careful access controls — limit agent scope
Webhook payloads can be large for accounts with rich usage data
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer business intelligence including health scores and revenue data. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. API token auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer health and revenue intelligence. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency option. API token scoped to tenant.
